name: Asparagus, Sausage and Pepper Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Teaspoon crushed dried red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium-size saucepan.
2. Sauté onions and garlic until onions are transparent and garlic is slightly browned.
3. Add red and yellow peppers to the pan and sauté for about 5 minutes, or until peppers begin to soften. Set aside.
4. In a large, heavy-bottomed pot, brown sausage links in batches, cooking each batch approximately 20 minutes. Remove from the pot, drain on paper towel, and cut into 1/4-inch slices.
5. Remove all but 1 tablespoon of fat from the pot. Over medium heat, stir in white wine, mixing well with scrapings from the bottom of the pot.
6. Add onion, garlic, and pepper mixture to the saucepan.
7. Stir in plum tomatoes, oregano (dried or fresh), black pepper, crushed red-pepper flakes, and sausage slices.
8. Simmer uncovered for 25 minutes.
9. Boil water for rigatoni and cook until done.
10. In the last 8 minutes of cooking the sauce, add asparagus and continue to simmer for 8 more minutes, or until asparagus is tender.
11. Drain rigatoni and serve with the sauce.
